markets.rules_primary: If Santos FC SP records the first goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Botafogo FR RJ vs Santos FC SP professional Brasileiro Serie A soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 16, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
